summary: Planned conservative inventory classifications for 5 open PRs. No shared canonical was provided or inferred, no security-sensitive refs were detected, and no close/merge/fix actions are recommended.

actions.reason: Independent focused PR with no hydrated duplicate, superseding canonical, low-signal basis, or security route. Keep open for normal maintainer review.
Independent focused PR with a waiting-on-author signal and no hydrated duplicate or superseding canonical. Keep open rather than close or merge from this inventory shard.
Independent contributor PR with useful focused code and proof. Stale label alone is not a low-signal close basis, and no hydrated replacement or duplicate is present.
Independent focused PR with proof and no hydrated duplicate or superseding canonical. Keep open for maintainer review; merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter.
Independent small docs PR with no hydrated duplicate, replacement, or low-signal close basis. Keep open for maintainer review.
